name: Cool Strawberry Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dry Red Wine or Rose' Wine (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare sugar syrup, combine water, sugar, cinnamon and allspice in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to boiling over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
4. Working in batches if necessary, combine berries, orange juice, lemon juice and sugar syrup in a food processor or blender.
5. Whirl until pureed.
6. Press through fine sieve into a bowl.
7. Stir in wine, if using.
8. Pour into storage container and refrigerate overnight or up to 3 days.
9. Serve with a dollop of yogurt and slice of lemon, if desired.
